title: Congratulations to Cristina Guida, Peter Salerno, and Alannah Glintz for being Certified by the Law Society of Ontario as a Specialist in Citizenship and Immigration Law - Green & Spiegel
content:
## Congratulations to Cristina Guida, Peter Salerno, and Alannah Glintz for being Certified by the Law Society of Ontario as a Specialist in Citizenship and Immigration Law

## Congratulations to Cristina Guida, Peter Salerno, and Alannah Glintz for being Certified by the Law Society of Ontario as a Specialist in Citizenship and Immigration Law
Green & Spiegel is pleased to congratulate three of our lawyers on their Certification by the Law Society of Ontario as Specialists in Citizenship and Immigration Law.
This designation reflects their exceptional expertise across both individual and corporate immigration, as well as their continued commitment to delivering outstanding client service and leadership in the field.
Congratulations Cristina Guida , Peter Salerno , and Alannah Glintz on this accomplishment!
- Cristina Guida Cristina Guida is a Partner with Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto. View Author Bio
Cristina Guida is a Partner with Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto.
- Peter Salerno Peter Salerno is a Partner at Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto. View Author Bio
Peter Salerno is a Partner at Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto.
- Alannah Glintz Alannah Glintz is a Senior Associate at Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto. View Author Bio
Alannah Glintz is a Senior Associate at Green and Spiegel LLP in Toronto.
